content:
## MARKET OVERVIEW

1. What is the Current Market Regime?
NEUTRAL regime — normal volatility (Vol: 25.9%) with very narrow participation (Breadth: 1/8 sectors positive), signalling limited leadership and fragile internals.

2. Which sectors are leading?
Heavy Industry leading: ASELS ABOVE TREND: ASELS (1W: +2.65% | 1M: +9.19%), ARCLK RECOVERY: ARCLK (1W: +4.65% | 1M: -8.52%), FROTO RECOVERY: FROTO (1W: +1.40% | 1M: -8.34%).

3. Which sectors are lagging?
Banking, Energy & Chemicals and Technology are lagging; HALKB BELOW TREND: HALKB (1W: -12.23% | 1M: -20.39%), VAKBN BELOW TREND: VAKBN (1W: -4.50% | 1M: -22.40%), TCELL BELOW TREND: TCELL (1W: -4.22% | 1M: -14.45%).

## STOCK PERFORMANCE

4. Top Performing Stocks?
PETKM ABOVE TREND: PETKM (1W: +7.51% | 1M: +9.84%), SISE RECOVERY: SISE (1W: +5.38% | 1M: -4.49%), ARCLK RECOVERY: ARCLK (1W: +4.65% | 1M: -8.52%), ASELS ABOVE TREND: ASELS (1W: +2.65% | 1M: +9.19%), KONTR RECOVERY: KONTR (1W: +2.55% | 1M: -9.85%).

5. Worst Performing Stocks?
TRALT BELOW TREND: TRALT (1W: -14.33% | 1M: -15.34%), HALKB BELOW TREND: HALKB (1W: -12.23% | 1M: -20.39%), SOKM BELOW TREND: SOKM (1W: -7.64% | 1M: -22.59%), GUBRF BELOW TREND: GUBRF (1W: -7.11% | 1M: -8.33%), TKFEN BELOW TREND: TKFEN (1W: -6.86% | 1M: -6.53%).

6. Momentum Stocks?
Up-momentum: PETKM ABOVE TREND: PETKM (1W: +7.51% | 1M: +9.84%), SISE RECOVERY: SISE (1W: +5.38% | 1M: -4.49%); Down-momentum: TRALT BELOW TREND: TRALT (1W: -14.33% | 1M: -15.34%), HALKB BELOW TREND: HALKB (1W: -12.23% | 1M: -20.39%).

## SECTOR OUTLOOK

7. Banking Sector Outlook?
Banking under pressure — sector 1W: -3.69% with broad weakness; AKBNK BELOW TREND: AKBNK (1W: -2.84% | 1M: -18.67%), GARAN BELOW TREND: GARAN (1W: -2.03% | 1M: -16.14%), TSKB RECOVERY: TSKB (1W: +1.73% | 1M: -12.69%).

8. Industrial Sector Outlook?
Heavy industry shows selective strength but lacks breadth; ASELS ABOVE TREND: ASELS (1W: +2.65% | 1M: +9.19%), EREGL BELOW TREND: EREGL (1W: -2.65% | 1M: -5.87%), TOASO RECOVERY: TOASO (1W: +1.47% | 1M: -7.46%).

9. Energy & Chemicals Outlook?
Energy mixed with quant leaders but overall weakness; PETKM ABOVE TREND: PETKM (1W: +7.51% | 1M: +9.84%), TUPRS CORRECTION: TUPRS (1W: -0.42% | 1M: +18.70%), HEKTS BELOW TREND: HEKTS (1W: -5.48% | 1M: -15.56%).

## PORTFOLIO STRATEGY

10. Portfolio Recommendation?
Neutral tactical stance: trim exposure to weak banks and discretionary retail, hold/accumulate high-quality momentum names in Heavy Industry and select Energy (PETKM, ASELS, TUPRS) while keeping liquidity for breadth recovery.

## NEXT WEEK OUTLOOK

11. Stocks to Watch Next Week?
PETKM ABOVE TREND: PETKM (1W: +7.51% | 1M: +9.84%), TUPRS CORRECTION: TUPRS (1W: -0.42% | 1M: +18.70%), ASELS ABOVE TREND: ASELS (1W: +2.65% | 1M: +9.19%), HALKB BELOW TREND: HALKB (1W: -12.23% | 1M: -20.39%).

12. Sectors to Watch Next Week?
Monitor Heavy Industry for leadership continuation and Energy & Chemicals for a potential rotation; keep an eye on Banking for volatility and headline-driven moves.

13. Key Levels & Triggers?
Watch XU100 technicals for confirmation of regime shift (breaks of short-term support or recovery above the 20-day band will matter); catalysts include CBRT guidance, global risk sentiment/US rates, oil prices, and company-specific news/earnings.

EXECUTIVE SUMMARY
NEUTRAL regime: volatility is normal (25.9%) but participation is narrow (1/8 sectors positive), so leadership is concentrated in Heavy Industry and select Energy names. Tactical bias: favor high-quality momentum winners (PETKM, ASELS) and avoid crowded bank/retail losers until breadth improves.
